titleStmt.title: SII 38.371: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 371. (A.R. No. 371 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1443; Vikrama, Pañchami Monday. 1521 A.D.

summary.p: Records that (a lady) Āradēvarāchchi-āyi-ammaṉ, daughter of Surāchchiy-āyiammaṉ of Sīmarudarasar paḍaivīdu, got two kāṇi of ghee supplied annually on the occasion of Kārttigai (for burning lamps) to Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār at Dēvakkapuram in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu by two kuḍis (shepherds) Siṅgakkōṉ Iḷaiyaperumāḷ and Māṉakkōṉ Kariyāṉ chēraṉ who were residents of Soṟṟukkuṉṟi, an umbaḷikkai village of the donor.
The temple accountant Uttaṇḍi wrote this epigraph (conveying this charity).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvatti śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura
kaṇṭakaṭṭā(ā)ri cāḷuvak kṛṣṇatevamakārāyar
piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam
1000 100 4 10 3 mel cellāniṉṟa vikkiṟamavaruṣattu
pañcamiyum comavāramum peṟṟa nāḷ murukamaṅkalapaṟṟu
tevastāṉam tevakāpuram tirumalaruṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku ci marutara
carpaṭaiviṭu cūrācciāyiammaṉ kumāratti Āratevarācci Āyi
ammaṉ tammiṭa Umpaḷakkai Ūril tammuṭa taṉmamāka tiruviḷakku
kku viṭṭa coṟṟukkuṉṟiyil maṉṟāṭi ciṅkakkoṉ yiḷaiyaperu
mā(ḷ)ḷu(ka)kku Aḷakku neyi � māṉakkoṉ kariyāṉ
ceraṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār varuṣattukku Aḷakku neyi ta � Āka kuṭi
yāṇṭukku varuṣam 1 kku Aḷakku neyi � yinta neyyiru
kāṇiyum tirukkāttikaikku Aḷantu cukattileyirukkavum
yinta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku
Ūṟkaṇakku Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu yintataṉmattukku Akutam
paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa
pāvattile pokakaṭaivar Ākavum .
Digital edition of SII 38.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
